mapper.select: SELECT i.id AS id, i.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, i.quantity AS quantity, i.operator AS operator, i.create_time AS createTime FROM inbound_order i INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = i.product_id ORDER BY i.create_time DESC, i.id DESC

SELECT i.id AS id, i.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, i.quantity AS quantity, i.operator AS operator, i.create_time AS createTime FROM inbound_order i INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = i.product_id WHERE i.id = #{id}
